steps: Soak moong dal 2 hrs, blend with ginger and green chilli to smooth batter.
Add chopped onion, cumin, coriander and salt.

no soaking needed ~12 min.
Heat ghee, add cumin, then garlic until golden.
Add onion 4 min, then tomato and green chilli until soft.
Add chopped methi, cook 3 min until wilted.
Combine with dal, simmer 5 min. Serve with chapati.
D.tip: If methi is too bitter, sprinkle with salt, rest 10 min, squeeze out water.

steps: Heat oil, add cumin, fry onion golden ~4 min.
Add ginger, garlic and green chilli. Cook 1 min.
Add tomatoes, turmeric, red chilli until mashy ~3 min.
Crumble in paneer, stir gently, cook 2 min.

steps: Drain and rinse chickpeas well.
Dice cucumber, quarter cherry tomatoes, thinly slice red onion.
Combine chickpeas, cucumber, tomatoes, olives and onion.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt and pepper for dressing.
Toss everything, crumble feta on top.
L.tip: Marinate red onion in lemon juice 10 min steps: Toast 2 slices of sourdough until golden and crisp.
Halve avocado, scoop flesh into bowl. Mash with fork, add lemon juice, olive oil, salt and pepper.
Spread generously on toast. Top with chilli flakes.
Optional: add a fried or poached egg on top.

Roll dough disc, add filling in centre, seal edges, roll gently into paratha.
Cook on hot tawa, apply ghee both sides until golden spots appear ~4 min.

steps: Heat oil, add cumin, fry onion golden ~4 min.
Add ginger, garlic and green chilli. Cook 1 min.
Add tomatoes, turmeric, red chilli until mashy ~3 min.
Crumble in paneer, stir gently, cook 2 min.
Finish with garam masala and coriander.

onions in butter until deep golden. Add ginger, garlic, cook 2 min.
Add blended tomatoes and red chilli. Cook until butter separates.
Add cooked lentils + water. Simmer low 15 min, stirring often.
Stir in cream and garam masala. Simmer 5 min more.
D.tip: Low and slow is the secret. Tastes even better the next day.

steps: Soak moong dal 2 hrs, blend with ginger and green chilli to smooth batter.
Add chopped onion, cumin, coriander and salt.

steps: Boil soya chunks 5 min in salted water, squeeze completely dry.
Fry onion golden, add ginger and garlic, cook 2 min.
Add tomatoes, red chilli and cumin. Cook until mashy.
Stir in beaten curd slowly. Add soya + 1 cup water, simmer 10 min.
Finish with garam masala and coriander.
L.tip: Squeezing soya dry removes raw smell and helps masala penetrate.

diced capsicum and onion in oil until soft. Add black beans and corn.
Season with cumin, smoked paprika, salt and pepper. Cook 2 min more.
Lay tortilla flat. Add cheese on one half, then vegetable mix, then more cheese.
Fold in half. Press in a dry pan on medium ~2 min each side until golden.

steps: Pour muesli into a bowl.
Add milk or Greek yogurt to your preferred consistency.
Top with fresh berries, sliced banana and a drizzle of honey.

Dice cucumber, halve tomatoes, chop parsley.
Assemble: quinoa base topped with all vegetables, chickpeas and crumbled feta.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. Spoon hummus on the side.
D.tip: Warm pita bread on the side makes this more filling.

steps: Boil pasta in salted water until al dente. Reserve pasta water.
